data.body:
## Done Definitions (lightweight preplanning)

- When this epic is complete, record-test-status.sh computes a centrality score (direct reference count via ast-grep) for each staged source file and logs the result to centrality-log.jsonl
  ← Satisfies: "record-test-status.sh computes a centrality score for each staged source file"
- When this epic is complete, any staged file with centrality score exceeding test_gate.centrality_threshold (default: 8) causes the full test suite to run instead of only associated tests
  ← Satisfies: "When any staged file's centrality score exceeds threshold, run full test suite"
- When this epic is complete, changesets exceeding test_gate.file_count_threshold (default: 50) staged files skip centrality computation and run the full suite directly
  ← Satisfies: "When staged file count exceeds threshold, skip centrality and run full suite"
- When this epic is complete, .claude/dso-config.conf contains example import patterns for Python, Flask, Ruby, Next.js/TypeScript, Java, and Bash under test_gate.import_pattern.<lang> keys
  ← Satisfies: "Import patterns defined in config with examples for 6 languages"
- When this epic is complete, running record-test-status.sh on a system without ast-grep produces a one-line stderr warning, defaults centrality to 0, and behaves identically to current behavior
  ← Satisfies: "Graceful degradation when sg not installed"
- When this epic is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Scope
- IN: Centrality scoring in record-test-status.sh, config keys for thresholds and import patterns, JSONL logging, graceful degradation, example patterns for 6 languages
- OUT: ast-grep installation (handled by dafa-b1fe), modifications to pre-commit-test-gate.sh (hook reads status file as before), transitive dependency analysis

## Considerations
- [Performance] ast-grep invocation per staged file adds wall-clock time — caching per diff hash mitigates but first-run cost could be 10-20s for 20 files
- [Reliability] Graceful degradation must be tested on systems without ast-grep
- [Testing] New threshold branching and caching logic in record-test-status.sh needs comprehensive unit tests
- [Maintainability] 6 import patterns must stay in sync with ast-grep pattern syntax; no runtime validation that patterns are syntactically correct
